verification.note: HUF's slab/rebate/deduction treatment relative to an individual is a long-standing, unchanged structural rule. Checked against the Income Tax Department's own HUF tax rates page and multiple current filing guides; re-check only if a Budget/Finance Act amendment is reported.

source_refs: Income Tax Act, 1961, Section 87A (rebate limited to a resident individual, not an HUF)
